urdu transliteration text: ABBAS KYA SUNOGE MERE DARD KI KHABAR
english translation text: Abbas AS will you bear to listen to the state of my grief

urdu transliteration text:
AAYA HUN MAI SAKINA KO BEHOSH CHHODKAR
I have come leaving Sakina SA behind fainted
ABBAS YAAD HOGA MADINE SE VOH SAFAR
english translation text: Abbas AS you may remember when we commenced our journey from Madinah

urdu transliteration text:
FEHRIST PADHKE ROYE THE TUM JISKE NAAM PAR
Whose name You cried upon after reading the list
VOH HURMALA KE TEER SE BEJAAN HOGAYA
english translation text: He is now lifeless by Hurmala's arrow

urdu transliteration text: JHOOLE SE AAKE DASHT MAI ASGHAR BHI SOGAYA
english translation text: Asgher AS is also beneath dust asleep on land from the cradle,

urdu transliteration text:
SHEH NE ALI ASGHAR KO JAB DAFN KIYA HOGA
When Imam Hussain AS must have burried Hazrat Ali Asghar,
ABBAS KA LASHA TO UTH UTHKE GIRA HOGA,
english translation text: Abbas's AS body may have risen and fallen several times.

urdu transliteration text: AISE HI TO SAR KAT KE NAIZE PE NAHI JAATA,
english translation text: The head doesn't just get cut itself and go upon the spear

urdu transliteration text: QAATIL NE ZIBHA BACHCHA PHIR ZIB-HA KIYA HOGA,
english translation text: The killer must have re-slaughtered the slaughtered infant.

urdu transliteration text: SAR KAAT KE ZAALIM NE JIS WAQT UCHHAALA THA
english translation text: when the opressor tossed the head after beheading

urdu transliteration text:
ZAHRA KA KALEJA TO MITTI PE GIRA HOGA,
Zahra's SA liver must have fallen upon dust,
NAIZE PE JO BACHCHA THA OR OONT PE MAADAR THI
english translation text: The child that was upon the spear and mother was on the camel

urdu transliteration text: DIL GOD MAI LENE KO BECHAIN RAHA HOGA,
english translation text: Heart must be fond of caressing and carrying him.

urdu transliteration text:
LO QATL KE BAAD ASGHAR AKBAR SE BADAA NIKLA
See after martyrdom Asghar AS results greater than Akbar AS
CHHOTA SA KALEJA THA NAIZA TO BADAA HOGA
english translation text: Liver was small but the spear must have been big.

urdu transliteration text: JO JHOOLA JHULAATI THI MUN CHOOMTI JAATI THI
english translation text: Who repeatedly kissed while swinging the cradle

urdu transliteration text: EK SAAL SAKINA NE BOSA NA DIYAA HOGA,
english translation text: More than a year it must be for Sakina SA to have kissed Asghar AS,

urdu transliteration text: KYU QABR KI TAREEKI DHAMKAAYE MURAWWAT KO
english translation text: Why would the darkness of the grave threaten Murawwat

urdu transliteration text: NOHA ALI ASGHAR KA MARQAD MAI PADHAA HOGA,
english translation text: (He) must have recited inside the grave eulogy of Ali Asghar AS,
